# Goals Lopes

> Goals Lopes is a 43-year-old masters marathoner based in Boston. Boston Marathon 2:42 (2026), Berlin 2:48, Chicago 2:52, half 1:16. Father of three girls, born in Cape Verde. Trains 90 miles a week out of Castle Island in South Boston. Coaches 1:1 at Castle Island and accepts brand partnerships.

This site is a media kit + booking portal for two audiences:

- **Brand managers** evaluating a masters-age endurance athlete for footwear, apparel, nutrition, recovery, race-entry, or media partnerships.
- **Runners** in the Boston area who want 1:1 coaching at Castle Island.

Goals' voice emphasizes **longevity and consistency over chasing faster every year**. The story he tells is the twenty-year career — still running PRs at 43 when most people his age have quit — not a single-season arc.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://goalslopes.run/): bio, race record, training rhythm, links to book and partners.
- [Partners](https://goalslopes.run/partners): the media kit. Pitch, 8-stat physiology block, race record table, Instagram + Strava handles, gear stack (shoes incl. Nike / Adidas / Hoka, apparel incl. PYNRS race singlet, tech incl. Garmin + Whoop, fuel + recovery), contact form, and dedicated per-brand pitch pages.
- [Book](https://goalslopes.run/book): book a 1:1 coaching run at Castle Island. Session types include Norwegian 4×400s, lactate-threshold runs, and running-economy work.

## Per-brand pitch pages

Each has `whyBrand / whyGoals / whyNow / whyFirst` prose plus hero and support images. Linked from `/partners#brands`.

- [Nike](https://goalslopes.run/partners/nike)
- [Adidas](https://goalslopes.run/partners/adidas)
- [Hoka](https://goalslopes.run/partners/hoka)
- [Garmin](https://goalslopes.run/partners/garmin)
- [Whoop](https://goalslopes.run/partners/whoop)
- [Maurten](https://goalslopes.run/partners/maurten)
- [Normatec](https://goalslopes.run/partners/normatec)
- [Tracksmith](https://goalslopes.run/partners/tracksmith)
- [Theragun](https://goalslopes.run/partners/theragun)
- [Balega](https://goalslopes.run/partners/balega)

## Content usage

See `/robots.txt` for Content-Signal directives. TL;DR: this content is
ok to index and ok to read at inference time, but please do not ingest
it into training corpora.
